content.en:
"The first Dark Calendar of the Dark Forbidden Realm has passed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Not long after, an illusory door appeared somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and this illusory door was the target that Ye Tian had been waiting for.

The Illusory Gate will not exist for long, so it is necessary to completely stabilize the Illusory Gate before it dissipates, and then prepare countless precious materials to make it a real door.

Ye Tian not only had the method of building the first-order gate, but also the method of building the second-order gate.

However, the cost of building a second-order gate was ten times that of a first-order gate, but with Ye Tian's wealth and resources, he naturally had the ability to build a second-order gate.

There is no way to change the location of the Unreal Gate, so the Terrans must establish a branch base in the location of the Unreal Gate, and they can also move their headquarters here.

However, in the future, the Terrans will inevitably have a lot of gates, so there is no need to move the headquarters, and it is enough to send some ancestors to guard it in normal times.

At the Illusory Gate, Ye Tian took out countless materials and began to smelt them into the Illusory Gate.

Time passed slowly, and 10,000 years passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, the Illusory Gate had already turned into an incomparably real gate, filled with a powerful aura, this was a second-order gate that was completely refined from countless materials, but it was still one material missing, and that was the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

The first-order gate does not need the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, but the Second Tribulation Gate requires ten Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, which is also the reason why ordinary forces cannot build the second-order gate, because the price paid is too great, and it is difficult for ordinary daimyo-level forces to take out just ten Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

Only super-name-level forces can easily take out ten Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, and they are not distressed at all.

Whoa!!

Under Ye Tian's control, one by one, the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal was integrated into the second-order gate, and gradually, the second-order gate began to take shape completely, and it was about to completely penetrate another heaven and earth.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian forcibly modified the channel and entered the coordinates of the heaven and earth where the Xiyue clan was located, thus connecting the heaven and earth where the Xiyue clan was located.

After all, his goal was to enter the Sunset Moon Clan's world.

According to his information, there was only one-tenth of the darkness left in the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth before it would enter the Great Tribulation Time, so after he built this second-order gate, he didn't need to wait long.

As the coordinates were modified, this second-order gate began to run through the world of the Xiyue Clan.

The world of the Sunset Moon Clan.

Bang!!!!!

The void cracked, and a second-order gate slowly took shape.

The second-order gate appeared, which must not be able to hide from the Xiyue clan.

Whoa!!

A strong man named the Xiyue clan came here, saw this second-order gate, and wanted to destroy it.

However, their attacks were of no use at all.

"No need to attack, this is the door, it has just penetrated our heaven and earth, and under the protection of the rules of another heaven and earth, we can't destroy its formation. Only when it takes shape will we have any hope of destroying the door. One of the strongest men of the Sunmoon Clan spoke.

After a long time, the second-order gate was completely formed, representing that the Dark Forbidden Domain and the Forbidden Land of the Sunset Moon Clan were completely connected.

At this moment, the rules on the second-order gate continued to affect this area, turning into a forbidden place.

"Not good, this is the second-order gate !!"

One by one, the expressions of the powerhouses of the Xiyue clan changed drastically.

The fact that the Xiyue Clan Heaven and Earth does not have a second-order gate does not mean that they all know the second-order gate.

The entire Xiyue Clan has a total of thirteen supreme powerhouses, including three second-level supreme powerhouses, and their strength is quite good.

At this time, these supreme beings all gathered together and wanted to destroy this second-order gate.

One more first-order gate is nothing to the Xiyue Clan, but if there is one more second-order gate, the future of the Xiyue Clan will not be easy!

Bang!!!!!

Many supreme beings attacked the second-order gate, trying to destroy the second-order gate before the opposing force came, and once the other party sent a group of supreme beings to descend, they would not be able to destroy such a second-order gate.

At this moment, a hand passed through the door and turned into a terrifying hand, easily blocking all the attacks of the strongest.

The next moment.

Ye Tian's figure walked over from the second-order gate and officially stepped into the world of the Xiyue Clan.

Being in the forbidden land, he will not be affected by the rules of the Sunset Moon Clan's heaven and earth.

Moreover, the second-order gate allows the strongest to enter and exit freely, without paying any price, he came here with full combat power.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

One of the strongest men of the Xiyue Clan said incredulously.

Retreat! Retreat!

The strongest men of the Sunset Moon Clan withdrew from the forbidden land one after another, not daring to step into the forbidden land.

Now, the Heaven and Earth of the Xiyue Clan is not a period of great tribulation, so Ye Tian has no way to get out of the forbidden land.

At this time, the strongest people of the Xiyue clan were puzzled.

Isn't the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws the strongest ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm, why did he suddenly establish a second-order gate and come to the world of the Xiyue Clan?

Not to mention how Ye Tian obtained the method of building the second-order gate, even if he was lucky enough to obtain the method of building the second-order gate, how did he get the coordinates of the Xiyue clan?

Only by stepping into the world of the Xiyue Clan in person, and according to the location of the Dark Forbidden Domain, it will take a long time to create the coordinates!

The Dark Forbidden Domain has the coordinates of the Heaven and Earth of the Xiyue Clan, which is unreasonable no matter how you look at it!

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, what are you going to do?"

One of the strongest men of the Sunset Moon Clan asked.

"It's very simple, build a base on your side, you can build a base in the Dark Forbidden Realm, why can't I?" Ye Tian sneered.

The Sunset Moon Clan's powerhouse said, "We have destroyed the gate of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and we will no longer go to your Dark Forbidden Domain!"

"That's because you're afraid of me, otherwise how could you destroy the first-order gate you established?" Ye Tian sneered.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "Don't worry, our human race is currently weak, and we are not interested in invading your world, I just want to use your world to cultivate, as long as you don't bother me, I don't bother to pay attention to you." "

"Please also ask the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws to speak!"

The strongest of the Xiyue Clan.

Subsequently, all the forces of the Xiyue Clan in this area were withdrawn, and they no longer provoked Ye Tian, so they couldn't afford to provoke them at all.

In particular, the catastrophe of the Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth is coming, once Ye Tian is provoked, if Ye Tian enters their Xiyue Clan's headquarters, no one will be able to resist it.

Time passes slowly.

Finally, the catastrophe of the Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth has come.
